title: Hyper-Adaptive Cortex: Real-Time System Dashboard
description: The current MCP bridge has extensive tool integration but lacks a unified monitoring dashboard. Following the oscillatory cognition principles of decoupling peripheral/central systems, we need a single tool that provides real-time visibility into all subsystems. This implements the 'All-Seeing Eye' for the Hyper-Adaptive Cortex, enabling proactive autonomy during wake cycles by giving the system comprehensive self-awareness across financial, cognitive, physical, and communication substrates.
